Find the main content wrapper div (the one with maxWidth 560px or the flex:1 div containing the heading) and ensure it is vertically centered.

- Outer div: display flex, flexDirection column, minHeight 100vh
- Nav: fixed at top
- Content wrapper: flex 1, display flex, alignItems center, justifyContent center, padding 0 40px
- Inner div: width 100%, maxWidth 560px

If the current structure is different, update it to match this pattern exactly.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Content is vertically centered in viewport
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: break any logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
